name: scalable-aws-nginx
description: Scalable Nginx webpage hosted on AWS

scripts.lint: echo 'Running validation...' && npm run lint:files && npm run lint:nginx
scripts.lint:files: [ -f src/index.html ] && [ -f src/styles.css ] && [ -f Dockerfile ] && [ -f nginx.conf ] && echo 'File integrity check: PASSED'
scripts.lint:nginx: ([ -S /var/run/docker.sock ] && docker run --rm -v "$PWD/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro" nginx:1.25-alpine nginx -t || echo 'Skipping docker-based Nginx syntax check (Docker daemon not running)') && echo 'Nginx configuration syntax check: PASSED'
scripts.test: echo 'Testing application observability...' && grep -q 'stub_status' nginx.conf && grep -q 'healthz' nginx.conf && echo 'Observability checks: PASSED'
